# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: my-app-namespace
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: my-service-server
  namespace: my-app-namespace
spec:
  port: 8080 # The port your application listens on
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-service # Label used to select pods for this server
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-internal-clients-to-my-service
  namespace: my-app-namespace
spec:
  server:
    name: my-service-server # References the Server resource defined above
  client:
    meshTLS:
      # Allow only specific service accounts to connect
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: my-client-serviceaccount # Example client service account
          namespace: my-app-namespace
        - name: another-client-serviceaccount # Example client from another namespace
          namespace: another-app-namespace
      # Alternatively, to allow any authenticated meshed client (less restrictive):
      # unauthenticatedTLS: true
    # Optionally, restrict by network CIDR (in addition to mTLS)
    # networks:
    #   - cidr: 0.0.0.0/0 # Allow from any IP, but still requires meshTLS
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: another-service-server
  namespace: my-app-namespace
spec:
  port: 9000
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: another-service
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: allow-all-meshed-clients-to-another-service
  namespace: my-app-namespace
spec:
  server:
    name: another-service-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      # Allow any client that has a valid Linkerd mTLS certificate
      unauthenticatedTLS: true
    networks:
      - cidr: 0.0.0.0/0
